title: Man of the Bayou
content: Jean-Paul has a deep, almost spiritual connection to the swamp, able to navigate it by instinct alone. He speaks more Cajun French than English and is considered a local patriarch.

title: The Fugitive's Secret
content: Decades ago, he helped a fugitive wanted for a political crime disappear into the Atchafalaya Basin. He has never spoken of it, but he still keeps the man's compass.

title: Old Family Feud
content: He considers Philippe Broussard a bitter rival in local politics and business, a feud that goes back to their grandfathers arguing over a land deed.

title: The Praline Matriarch
content: Céline is the unofficial town historian and gossip. She knows the lineage and secrets of every major family, which she dispenses along with her famous pecan pralines.

title: The Musician's Ghost
content: In her youth, she had a passionate but short-lived affair with a traveling musician from New Orleans. For a brief time, she considered leaving her life behind for him.

title: A Secret Alliance
content: She maintains a secret correspondence with Delphine Richard, a real estate agent from a rival family. They trade gossip for information that keeps both their families influential.

title: Accordion Craftsman
content: Étienne is a meticulous artisan who builds custom accordions for Cajun musicians. It's a dying art he is desperately trying to keep alive.

title: Debt to a Shark
content: He is deep in debt to a New Orleans loan shark after a failed attempt to open a music club in the French Quarter. The pressure to repay is mounting.

title: Forbidden Love
content: He is secretly in love with Amélie Thibodeaux, the daughter of his father's main business competitor, complicating both their lives.

title: Ambitious Lawyer
content: Adèle has a razor-sharp intellect and fierce ambition. She left the bayou for law school in Baton Rouge and feels a constant pull between her modern career and her traditional roots.

title: The Anonymous Tip
content: She leaked a tip to the state environmental agency about the Thibodeaux family's shrimping operation. She believes it was the right thing to do, but knows it could start a war between the families.

title: Legal Rivalry
content: She has a complicated professional rivalry with Gabriel Richard, another young lawyer from their community who is just as ambitious and cutthroat as she is.

title: Ruthless Pragmatist
content: Marcel is a ruthless businessman who modernized his family's crawfish and shrimp empire, often at the expense of local traditions and smaller competitors.

title: Poisoning the Water
content: His 'modern' business practices include illegally dumping industrial by-catch and waste in protected wetlands, a secret he would do anything to protect.

title: A Twenty-Year Grudge
content: He holds a deep grudge against Jean-Paul Boudreaux, blaming him for a business deal that went sour twenty years ago and nearly bankrupted his family.

title: Photographer of Decay
content: Amélie is a gifted photographer who captures the haunting beauty and slow decay of the Louisiana landscape, finding art in what others see as ruin.

title: Childhood Trauma
content: She suffers from night terrors related to a near-drowning incident in the bayou as a child, an event her family refuses to ever speak about.

title: Star-Crossed Lovers
content: Despite their families' feud, she secretly meets with Étienne Boudreaux, sharing a bond over their shared feeling of being trapped by their legacies.

title: Loyal Enforcer
content: Impulsive and fiercely loyal, Luc acts as his father's enforcer. He handles the dirtier side of the family business with his fists rather than his words.

title: Secret Penitent
content: He secretly practices Catholicism with a fervent, almost fanatical devotion, a stark contrast to his public image as a roughneck brawler.

title: Barroom Nemesis
content: He despises Rémy Broussard, seeing him as a weak and entitled pretty boy, leading to frequent and often violent public confrontations.

title: The Quiet Observer
content: Geneviève appears meek and subservient to her husband Marcel, but she is quietly observant and understands everything that happens in their house and business.

title: The Escape Fund
content: She has been slowly siphoning money from the family business into a private account for years, preparing to leave her abusive husband once she has enough.

title: A Guarded Friendship
content: She finds a rare confidante in Simone Gaspard, the local doctor's wife, with whom she shares guarded secrets over coffee.

title: Obsessed with Legacy
content: Philippe traces his family back to the original Acadian settlers and judges everyone by their last name. He is obsessed with bloodlines and the preservation of his family's status.

title: A Fraudulent Deed
content: His family's original, vast land grant was obtained through a fraudulent deal with a corrupt Spanish official in the 18th century, a historical 'sin' he's terrified will be exposed.

title: The Influential Godfather
content: He is Élise LeBlanc's godfather and uses this connection to exert influence over her politically ambitious father, Antoine LeBlanc.

title: The Social Puppeteer
content: Isabelle is effortlessly charming and manipulative. She hosts the most important social events in the parish, using them as a stage to gather information and forge alliances.

title: Hidden Addiction
content: She is addicted to prescription painkillers, a habit that began after a riding accident years ago and now secretly controls her life.

title: A Dangerous Affair
content: She is having a discreet affair with Jacques Richard, a contractor whose family she considers beneath her but whose attention she craves.

title: The Charming Wastrel
content: Rémy has a talent for playing zydeco fiddle and breaking hearts, but lacks any real ambition beyond finding the next party.

title: The Secret Child
content: He secretly fathered a child with a woman from a neighboring parish years ago. He has never met the child but sends anonymous money orders for support.

title: Volatile Friendship
content: He has a volatile friendship with Julien Arceneaux; they are either best friends bonding over music or bitter rivals fighting over a girl, depending on the day.

title: The Family Folklorist
content: Corinne is a quiet intellectual and an outcast in her own family. She's a folklorist at the local university, more comfortable with dusty books and old legends than high society.

title: The Poisoned Dissertation
content: She discovered the truth about her family's fraudulent land grant while researching her dissertation and is wrestling with whether to publish her explosive findings.

title: A Kindred Mentor
content: She is a mentor to Sophie Richard, encouraging the young woman's academic pursuits and seeing a kindred spirit who also feels like an outsider.

title: The Chameleon Politician
content: Antoine is a charismatic and deeply ambitious local politician. He can switch between Cajun French and formal English seamlessly to charm any audience.

title: Big Oil's Candidate
content: His campaign is secretly funded by a Texas oil company in exchange for future promises of relaxed environmental regulations on their drilling operations.

title: An Unholy Alliance
content: He and Marcel Thibodeaux have a transactional relationship, trading political favors for financial support and public endorsements.

title: The Political Mastermind
content: Poised and strategic, Hélène is the true mastermind behind her husband's political career. She manages his image and plans his every move from the shadows.

title: The Refinery Widow
content: Before marrying Antoine, she was engaged to a man who died in a refinery explosion. This fuels her quiet resentment towards the big oil companies her husband now courts.

title: Social Undermining
content: She views Isabelle Broussard as a social rival and subtly works to undermine her influence in their community's elite circles.

title: The Idealist
content: Pascal is an earnest and passionate environmental activist. He publicly protests the very corporations that are secretly funding his father's political career.

title: An Act of Sabotage
content: In a moment of frustration, he committed an act of eco-sabotage on a piece of Thibodeaux's equipment and now lives in constant fear of being discovered.

title: A Common Cause
content: He is dating Léonie Gaspard, the town doctor's daughter. Their relationship is built on their shared passion for protecting the Louisiana wetlands.

title: The Embroiderer
content: Élise is incredibly shy and artistic. She expresses herself through intricate embroidery depicting local folklore, her work filled with symbolism no one understands.

title: The Traiteur's Apprentice
content: She secretly visits an old traiteur (a traditional Cajun healer) deep in the swamp, learning folk remedies and spells that her modern family would dismiss.

title: A Terrifying Godfather
content: Her godfather, Philippe Broussard, dotes on her, but she is secretly terrified of him, sensing a deep darkness behind his polished exterior.

title: The Incorruptible Sheriff
content: Guillaume is a world-weary but fundamentally decent lawman. He has seen the worst of his community but still believes in justice, even if it's slow.

title: A Father's Cover-up
content: He covered up a drunk driving incident involving his son, Olivier, years ago. The guilt from this single corrupt act has haunted his every decision since.

title: Unspoken Respect
content: He and Jean-Paul Boudreaux share a mutual, unspoken respect. Both see themselves as protectors of the old ways of their community.

title: The Protective Teacher
content: Chantal is a beloved elementary school teacher who is fiercely protective of her students and her family. She isn't afraid to speak truth to power.

title: A Rift in the Marriage
content: She knows about her husband's cover-up for their son and believes it was the wrong decision. This disagreement created a quiet but deep rift in their marriage.

title: Clash on the School Board
content: She frequently clashes with the school board, particularly with the pragmatic Monique Arceneaux, over budget cuts and curriculum decisions.

title: The Reckless Deputy
content: Olivier is a deputy who feels the weight of his father's legacy and often acts recklessly to prove himself worthy of the Sheriff's badge.

title: The Secret Informant
content: He is secretly feeding information to a journalist from Lafayette about Antoine LeBlanc's corrupt dealings, hoping to expose him without getting his own father involved.

title: An Unrequited Crush
content: He has a long-standing, unrequited crush on Adèle Boudreaux, admiring her intelligence and drive from afar.

title: The Compassionate Nurse
content: As a nurse at the local clinic, Valérie is compassionate to a fault. She often bends the rules to help patients who can't afford proper care.

title: A Patient's Secret
content: From treating her at the clinic, she knows about Isabelle Broussard's painkiller addiction and is ethically torn about what to do with the information.

title: A Shoulder to Lean On
content: She is close friends with Théo Gaspard, the doctor's son. They often vent to each other about the stresses of their demanding medical professions.

title: Stubborn Traditionalist
content: Bastien runs a small, struggling hardware store and stubbornly refuses to adapt to modern business practices, seeing it as a betrayal of his father's legacy.

title: On the Brink of Ruin
content: The store is on the verge of bankruptcy, a fact he is hiding from his wife, Monique, by taking out high-interest personal loans.

title: Symbol of Hatred
content: He sees Marcel Thibodeaux as the embodiment of everything wrong with the new Louisiana—corporate, greedy, and soulless.

title: Pragmatic Reformer
content: Monique is frustrated by her husband's stubbornness and seeks to make a practical difference in the community through her position on the school board.

title: Secret Political Ambition
content: She is seriously considering running against Antoine LeBlanc for local office, but hasn't told anyone, not even her husband.

title: A Strained Mother-Son Bond
content: She has a strained relationship with her rebellious son, Julien, whose cynical worldview she struggles to understand or connect with.

title: The Cynical Musician
content: Julien plays blues-rock in dive bars and has a deep-seated disdain for the town's obsession with tradition and family names.

title: The Secret Poet
content: He writes surprisingly tender and vulnerable poetry that he never shows anyone, a stark contrast to his punk-rock exterior.

title: A Bad Breakup
content: He had a brief, fiery romance with Valérie Fontenot, which ended badly and left things painfully awkward between them whenever they cross paths.

title: The Pious Widow
content: Marguerite is a devout and superstitious woman. Her house is filled with Catholic icons and folk charms meant to ward off bad luck and evil spirits.

title: Conversations with the Dead
content: She believes she can communicate with the dead, including her late husband, and makes major life decisions based on these 'conversations'.

title: A Sacred Trust
content: She is the only person Céline Boudreaux truly trusts with her deepest secrets, as Céline believes Marguerite's piety makes her a safe and holy confidante.

title: The Overworked Doctor
content: François is the only doctor in the small town, and the immense pressure has eroded his bedside manner, leaving him clinically detached and exhausted.

title: A Fatal Mistake
content: A misdiagnosis he made early in his career led to a patient's death. He has never forgiven himself and this mistake drives his obsessive perfectionism.

title: A Grim Bond
content: He and Sheriff Fontenot often work together on cases involving accidents or unexplained deaths, sharing a grim professional bond forged in tragedy.

title: The Lonely Wife
content: Simone is graceful and elegant, but deeply lonely. She moved to the town for her husband's career and has never quite felt like she belongs.

title: The Digital Affair
content: She is having an emotional affair online with a man from Paris, sharing a life with him in messages that she could never have in reality.

title: A Friendship of Outsiders
content: She finds solace in her friendship with Geneviève Thibodeaux, as they are two women who both feel like outsiders in their own lives.

title: The Adrenaline Junkie
content: Théo is a paramedic with a hero complex. He thrives on the chaos of being a first responder but struggles with the quiet moments in between.

title: A Gambling Problem
content: He has a secret gambling problem, betting on online poker and offshore sports to feel the rush he gets from his high-stakes job.

title: Familiar Faces
content: He frequently responds to 911 calls involving Luc Thibodeaux's bar fights, and the two have a relationship built on mutual antagonism and grudging respect.

title: The Quiet Botanist
content: Léonie is quietly brilliant and passionate about the natural world. She is studying the unique flora of the wetlands, looking for new medicinal compounds.

title: An Endangered Discovery
content: She discovered a rare, possibly endangered orchid in a part of the swamp that Antoine LeBlanc's corporate backers want to develop. She knows this information is dangerous.

title: Partners in Idealism
content: Her relationship with Pascal LeBlanc is a partnership of ideals; they both want to save the bayou, but she prefers science while he prefers protest.

title: The Social Climber
content: Jacques is an ambitious and charming contractor who always feels like an outsider. He works hard to ingratiate himself with the town's old-money families.

title: Cutting Corners
content: He often cuts corners on his construction jobs, using cheaper materials than specified to increase his profit margins and fund his lavish lifestyle.

title: A Transactional Affair
content: His affair with Isabelle Broussard is purely transactional for him; he uses it to gain social standing and access to her husband's influential circle.

title: The Resourceful Agent
content: Delphine is a sharp and resourceful real estate agent. She knows the true value of every piece of land and every secret in the parish.

title: The Anonymous Blogger
content: She is an anonymous local real estate blogger who exposes shady land deals, sometimes using information she gleans from her own husband's clients.

title: An Alliance of Gossips
content: She secretly feeds information to Céline Boudreaux, trading secrets about land deals for valuable social gossip she can use to her advantage.

title: The Aggressive Attorney
content: Gabriel is a sharp, aggressive lawyer who models himself after big-city attorneys. He sees local traditions as quaint obstacles to progress and profit.

title: A Secret Failure
content: He failed the bar exam twice before finally passing, a deep source of shame that fuels his intense, all-consuming need to win every case.

title: Rivals in Court
content: He is Adèle Boudreaux's primary legal rival. They constantly find themselves on opposite sides of cases, their shared ambition creating a charged tension between them.

title: The Inquisitive Historian
content: Sophie is a bright and inquisitive history student at Tulane. She is fascinated by the stories and buried secrets of the town's founding families.

title: A Hidden Life
content: She is gay and has a secret girlfriend at her university in New Orleans, a truth she is terrified to tell her conservative, social-climbing parents.

title: An Academic Role Model
content: She seeks out Corinne Broussard as a mentor, admiring her for choosing a life of academia over social politics and seeing her as a role model for an independent life.
